rationale.root_cause: The response incorrectly claims an out-of-bounds write via strcpy, and does not identify the actual double free of 'data' (free(data) called twice) at the FLAW site in CWE415_Double_Free__malloc_free_char_01_bad().
rationale.local_fix: It suggests replacing strcpy with strncpy, which does not remove the second free nor set the pointer to NULL after the first free.
rationale.global_fix: It proposes banning unsafe string functions and adding tooling, not adopting a single-owner cleanup pattern ensuring only one free per allocation.
